domains.description: AI adoption, data quality, lineage, model governance and operating model redesign.
Loan trading workflow automation, agency, post-trade controls and desk administration.
Sustainability accounting, ESG operating systems, decarbonisation execution and circular economy scaling.
Cyber resilience, ISMS automation, control evidence and operational security metrics.
Structured finance, corporate trust, issuer services, CLOs and securitisation operations.
Private equity, private credit, SRT, NAV financing, capital introduction and deal origination.

sales_enablement_catalogue.description: Named product/use-case/value-case catalogue used to generate profiles that RAINNegiotiator can sell from.

trading_markets.product_description: Loan Trading Operating System for secondary loan trading desks.
trading_markets.value_case: Can save over £1m per year by reducing manual trade lifecycle workflows, spreadsheet breaks, settlement delay and control failures.
trading_markets.buyer_use_case: Head of Credit Trading, Loan Trading Operations or COO needs to reduce costly manual workflows and improve execution/control visibility.
trading_markets.credibility: Designed around real bank loan trading workflow automation and front-to-middle-office control problems.

trading_markets.product_description: OTC Structured Products workflow and lifecycle automation platform.
trading_markets.value_case: Can remove hundreds of spreadsheets and reduce audit/control points across OTC structured product operations.
trading_markets.buyer_use_case: Structured products desk or middle office needs a golden source for trade lifecycle events and regulatory reporting.
trading_markets.credibility: Based on experience delivering platforms carrying more than $40bn through OTC structured product workflows.

trading_markets.product_description: Agency Lending TRS and securities lending lifecycle platform.
trading_markets.value_case: Can increase notional opportunity, automate TRS lifecycle events and reduce reconciliation/manual reset overhead.
trading_markets.buyer_use_case: Agency lending or TRS desk needs basket creation, swaps lifecycle control, recall/corporate-action handling and client reporting.
trading_markets.credibility: Built around real securities lending, TRS and agency desk transformation needs.

sustainability.value_case: Can identify material asset misvaluation, constructive obligations and transition/adaptation risk before they become board or market surprises.
sustainability.buyer_use_case: CFO, CSO, PE operating partner or credit investor needs decision-grade sustainability accounting and value-at-risk analysis.
sustainability.credibility: Combines sustainability accounting expertise, ontology, methodologies and judgement-library reasoning.

cyber_resilience.product_description: Cyber governance, controls, evidence and operational resilience automation.
cyber_resilience.value_case: Can save more than $10m by automating cyber control evidence, compliance workflows, drift detection and risk reporting.
cyber_resilience.buyer_use_case: CISO, CFO or risk leader needs measurable cyber resilience, audit evidence and continuous controls assurance.
cyber_resilience.credibility: Built around ISO27001, cyber metrics, workflow automation and technical-state-management requirements.

ai_transformation.product_description: High-value transaction introduction engine that identifies economically valuable people-to-people opportunities.
ai_transformation.value_case: Can create new revenue by surfacing hidden high-value introductions across firms, universities, events, communities and professional networks.
ai_transformation.buyer_use_case: Law firm, university, PE platform, ecosystem manager or innovation leader wants measurable ROI from relationship intelligence.
ai_transformation.credibility: Uses BVH, HVTI scoring and explainable RAIN negotiation objects to justify every introduction.
